Saturn in the 7th. (xi) Saturn conjoined with Mandi be in the
6th aspected by the Sun, Mars and Rahu, and without any benefic
aspect or association, (xii) Mars in the 6th house in a cruel
60th AriiSa, conjoined with Mercury and aspected by Venus,
(xiii) The 4th house being occupied by Jupiter who is aspected
or joined by the Sun and Mars, (xiv) The 4th house being
occupied by malefics, and its lord conjoined with malefics or
hemmed in between them.
Leprosy (i) Malefics other than the lord, occupying the
ascendant, (ii) The Moon along with Mars or Saturn be in
